description: A production authentication service at /home/ga/debug-auth/ is experiencing network issues. Deploy a packet capture sidecar named 'sniffer' using the 'alpine' image by modifying the docker-compose.yml. The 'sniffer' service must use tcpdump to capture traffic while sharing the network namespace of the 'auth-service' container. Save the capture to /data/capture.pcap, mapped to the host's ./captures volume. To meet security requirements, the container must not run in privileged mode; use Linux capabilities such as NET_ADMIN and NET_RAW to enable the capture. The task is complete when the capture file is successfully populated in the ./captures directory.
